import math
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F


class Encoder(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model=256):
        super().__init__()
        ch = [1, 64, 128, 256, d_model]
        self.conv1 = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(ch[0], ch[1], 3, padding=1),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ch[1]),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Conv2d(ch[1], ch[1], 3, padding=1),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ch[1]),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
        )
        self.conv2 = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(ch[1], ch[2], 3, padding=1),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ch[2]),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Conv2d(ch[2], ch[2], 3, padding=1),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ch[2]),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
        )
        self.conv3 = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(ch[2], ch[3], 3, padding=1),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ch[3]),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Conv2d(ch[3], ch[3], 3, padding=1),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ch[3]),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
        )
        self.conv4 = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(ch[3], ch[4], 3, padding=1),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ch[4]),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Conv2d(ch[4], ch[4], 3, padding=1),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ch[4]),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
        )
        self.pool_hv = nn.MaxPool2d(2, 2)
        self.pool_h = nn.MaxPool2d(kernel_size=(2, 1), stride=(2, 1))

    def forward(self, x):
        x = self.conv1(x)
        x = self.pool_hv(x)
        x = self.conv2(x)
        x = self.pool_hv(x)
        x = self.conv3(x)
        x = self.pool_h(x)
        x = self.conv4(x)
        b, c, h, w = x.shape
        x = x.mean(dim=2)
        x = x.permute(0, 2, 1).contiguous()
        return x


class AdditiveAttention(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model):
        super().__init__()
        self.key = nn.Linear(d_model, d_model, bias=False)
        self.query = nn.Linear(d_model, d_model, bias=False)
        self.v = nn.Linear(d_model, 1, bias=False)

    def forward(self, query, keys, mask=None):
        q = self.query(query).unsqueeze(1)
        k = self.key(keys)
        scores = self.v(torch.tanh(q + k)).squeeze(-1)
        if mask is not None:
            scores = scores.masked_fill(~mask, -1e9)
        attn = torch.softmax(scores, dim=-1)
        ctx = torch.bmm(attn.unsqueeze(1), keys).squeeze(1)
        return ctx, attn


class Decoder(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, vocab_size, d_model=256, emb_dim=192, dropout=0.1):
        super().__init__()
        self.embedding = nn.Embedding(vocab_size, emb_dim, padding_idx=0)
        self.attn = AdditiveAttention(d_model)
        self.gru = nn.GRUCell(emb_dim + d_model, d_model)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.out = nn.Linear(d_model * 2, vocab_size)

    def forward_step(self, prev_tok, hidden, enc, enc_mask):
        emb = self.dropout(self.embedding(prev_tok))
        ctx, attn = self.attn(hidden, enc, enc_mask)
        hidden = self.gru(torch.cat([emb, ctx], dim=-1), hidden)
        logits = self.out(torch.cat([hidden, ctx], dim=-1))
        return logits, hidden, attn


class HMERModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, vocab_size, d_model=256, emb_dim=192, dropout=0.1, sos_id=1, eos_id=2, pad_id=0):
        super().__init__()
        self.encoder = Encoder(d_model=d_model)
        self.decoder = Decoder(vocab_size=vocab_size, d_model=d_model, emb_dim=emb_dim, dropout=dropout)
        self.init_proj = nn.Linear(d_model, d_model)
        self.vocab_size = vocab_size
        self.sos_id = sos_id
        self.eos_id = eos_id
        self.pad_id = pad_id

    def encode(self, images, widths=None):
        enc = self.encoder(images)
        if widths is None:
            mask = torch.ones(enc.shape[:2], dtype=torch.bool, device=enc.device)
        else:
            feat_w = torch.clamp((widths // 4), min=1)
            feat_w = torch.clamp(feat_w, max=enc.size(1))
            ar = torch.arange(enc.size(1), device=enc.device).unsqueeze(0)
            mask = ar < feat_w.unsqueeze(1)
        pooled = (enc * mask.unsqueeze(-1)).sum(1) / mask.sum(1, keepdim=True).clamp_min(1)
        hidden = torch.tanh(self.init_proj(pooled))
        return enc, mask, hidden

    def forward(self, images, widths, tgt_in):
        enc, mask, hidden = self.encode(images, widths)
        logits = []
        prev = tgt_in[:, 0]
        for t in range(tgt_in.size(1)):
            if t > 0:
                prev = tgt_in[:, t]
            step_logits, hidden, _ = self.decoder.forward_step(prev, hidden, enc, mask)
            logits.append(step_logits.unsqueeze(1))
        return torch.cat(logits, dim=1)

    @torch.no_grad()
    def greedy_decode(self, images, widths, max_len=160):
        enc, mask, hidden = self.encode(images, widths)
        b = images.size(0)
        prev = torch.full((b,), self.sos_id, dtype=torch.long, device=images.device)
        outputs = []
        finished = torch.zeros(b, dtype=torch.bool, device=images.device)
        for _ in range(max_len):
            logits, hidden, _ = self.decoder.forward_step(prev, hidden, enc, mask)
            prev = logits.argmax(dim=-1)
            outputs.append(prev.unsqueeze(1))
            finished |= prev.eq(self.eos_id)
            if finished.all():
                break
        if outputs:
            return torch.cat(outputs, dim=1)
        return torch.empty((b, 0), dtype=torch.long, device=images.device)
